summary: Wire 7 profile definitions from registry.json into skill-orchestrator-runtime and using-superpowers SKILL.md files. Profiles enable curated skill subset loading for common task patterns (deep-refactoring, planning-cycle, review-cycle, parallel-implementation, browser-testing, diagnostic-healing, research-to-code) instead of scoring all 29 skills.
root_cause: Profiles existed in registry.json but were not referenced by any skill file. Agents had no guidance to use profile-based loading.
fix_approach: Added Profile-Based Loading section to skill-orchestrator-runtime with resolution algorithm and profile table. Added profile quick-reference table and updated Skill Priority section in using-superpowers.

validation.notes: Documentation-only changes to SKILL.md files. No runtime code changed.
